name: Is Progressive Disclosure All You Need for Long-Context Agents?
summary: arXiv:2607.17598v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-document question answering usually forces a choice between loading the whole document into the context window and bolting on a separate retriev...
description: arXiv:2607.17598v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-document question answering usually forces a choice between loading the whole document into the context window and bolting on a separate retriever. Agentic AI suggests a broader option, giving the agent the document path and letting it decide how and what to read. Agent Skills, a standard for packaging expertise into folders an agent loads on...
author: Yifeng He, Yinzhe Zhao, Jicheng Wang, Hao Chen
